selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel transport-language reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the relational transport parent into controller-facing fences for typed witness-bound transport, anti-identity defaults, explicit order-sensitive composition, nonsemantic witness support, anti-global-trivialization, and bounded future inverse or loop-effect handling.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel follow-on after the relational-transport boundary is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the transport-language boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: TRANSPORT_IS_EXPLICIT_TYPED_WITNESS_BOUND_AND_ONLY_OVER_DECLARED_STATE_TOKENS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's admitted transport object class without letting witness carriers become semantic or transport become untyped.

candidate_items.name: TRANSPORT_CANNOT_IMPORT_IDENTITY_EQUALITY_SUBSTITUTION_OR_DEFAULT_RELATION_LAWS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps transport local and non-identitarian instead of flattening into equivalence structure.

candidate_items.name: TRANSPORT_COMPOSITION_STAYS_EXPLICIT_AND_ORDER_SENSITIVE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's anti-algebraic-smoothing posture into a controller-facing fence around composition handling.

candidate_items.name: TRANSPORT_REMAINS_LOCAL_PARTIAL_AND_NONCANONICAL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's direct anti-global-trivialization and anti-canonical-map boundary.

candidate_items.name: FUTURE_INVERSE_QUOTIENT_AND_LOOP_EFFECT_OPENINGS_REMAIN_ANTI_IDENTITY_AND_ANTI_GEOMETRIC
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's bounded future-opening posture into a controller-facing fence.

quarantined_items.name: TRANSPORT_LANGUAGE_AS_EQUIVALENCE_OR_SUBSTITUTION_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent allows transport structure while explicitly denying identity, equality, and substitution inflation.

quarantined_items.name: TRANSPORT_LANGUAGE_AS_GLOBAL_CONNECTION_OR_MOTION_GEOMETRY_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it blocks global connection, geometry, and motion overread while leaving a thin transport layer available.

notes: This batch was produced as the twenty-fourth controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
